title: Runtime Mount Target Correction + Desktop Sticky Model Cleanup

proof.panelChain: div#ggPanelComments.gg-comments-panel <- div#postcards.gg-stack <- div#Blog1.widget.Blog <- div#blog.gg-home-blog__body.section <- div.gg-blog-main <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--post <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main

div#ggPanelComments.gg-comments-panel <- aside.gg-blog-sidebar.gg-blog-sidebar--right <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--post <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main <- div.gg-page-shell <- body.loading <- html
proof.sidebarChain: aside.gg-blog-sidebar.gg-blog-sidebar--right <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--post <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main <- div.gg-page-shell <- body.loading <- html
proof.rootChain: section#comments.gg-comments.comments2.threaded <- div.gg-comments-panel__body <- div#ggPanelComments.gg-comments-panel <- aside.gg-blog-sidebar.gg-blog-sidebar--right <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--post <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main <- div.gg-page-shell

proof.sidebarChain: aside.gg-blog-sidebar.gg-blog-sidebar--right <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--list <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main <- div.gg-page-shell <- body.loading.gg-is-landing <- html
proof.infoPanelChain: div.gg-info-panel <- aside.gg-blog-sidebar.gg-blog-sidebar--right <- div.gg-blog-layout.gg-blog-layout--list <- section#gg-home-blog.gg-home-blog <- main#gg-main.gg-main <- div.gg-page-shell <- body.loading.gg-is-landing <- html

old_conflict: Desktop runtime kept #ggPanelComments in the post/body stack and looked it up from main first.
Desktop CSS still treated #ggPanelComments as its own sticky shell with top:10px and height:calc(100dvh - 20px).
Desktop/narrow split was inconsistent because overlay media queries still ran up to 1200px while runtime mobile logic switched at 1023px.
removal: ui.layout._mountCommentsToSidebar now relocates the active comments panel under .gg-blog-sidebar--right and tags the mount at runtime.
Panels focus/backdrop/init now call syncCommentsMount so right-sidebar ownership is the active desktop truth.
Desktop #ggPanelComments now uses position:relative; flex:1 1 auto; width/height:100%; min-height:0, while overlay fixed behavior is scoped to max-width:1023px only.
sticky_model_cleanup.mobile_narrow_preserved: Overlay behavior is preserved only for max-width: 1023px; desktop no longer shares the old fixed-shell path.

inherited_from_editorial_preview: Rail child fills the sidebar interior instead of floating as a viewport-owned shell.
intentionally_not_inherited: Editorial preview content/card UI was not copied.
Info-sheet specific overlay behavior remains only for right-mode=info, not comments.
Comments still use their own runtime-owned thread/composer internals.
